JOHN LEE TOURS – Experience Ba Na Hills & the Golden Bridge Before the Crowds Enjoy a private early-morning tour from Da Nang or Hoi An with comfortable hotel pickup, a private vehicle, and an English-speaking guide. Visit the famous Golden Bridge, French Village, Linh Ung Pagoda, and Fantasy Park. ⚠️ IMPORTANT NOTE: Cable car tickets are NOT included in the tour price (approx. USD 40 per adult). Tickets are purchased separately at Ba Na Hills, and your guide will fully assist you with the process. ✨ WHY CHOOSE JOHN LEE TOURS ✨ ✅ Early departure to avoid the crowds ✅ Private tour with English-speaking guide ✅ Hotel pickup and drop-off included ✅ Flexible and personalized experience ✅ Assistance with cable car tickets ✅ No hidden fees ✅ 137+ excellent guest reviews ⭐ Trusted by hundreds of happy travelers ⭐ ⚠️ Reminder: Cable car tickets are not included and must be purchased separately on-site. Book with confidence and enjoy a hassle-free visit to Ba Na Hills.

The "Heritage Train" is a unique experience combination of transfer and sightseeing from Hue to Da Nang. The train is specially designed to bear the mark of the two central provinces of Hue and Da Nang. Moreover, artists purposely added prominent tourist locations along the route to emphasize the train. - Check-in at the 2 oldest train stations in Vietnam: Hue Railway Station and Da Nang Railway Station. - Admire the clear blue water of Lap An Lagoon and Lang Co Beach - Conquer and immerse yourself in the beautiful curves of Lang Co Bay and Danang Bay.

Discover Vietnam’s scenic Hai Van Pass on a private motorbike tour from Hue, Da Nang, or Hoi An—with the choice to ride as a pillion passenger with an Easy Rider or drive yourself (for licensed riders). Ride with a local guide, and enjoy photo breaks at Linh Ung Pagoda, Tam Giang Lagoon, Mo Waterfall, Lang Co Beach, the Marble Mountains, the abandoned water park, and the Hai Van Pass. Along the way, refuel with stops for local food and drinks (own expense).

This is the real street-food tour of Saigon. You’ll strap on your helmet and hit the streets by motorbike, just like the locals do, scouting the city for truly fresh flavor. Stopping in some of the city’s most diverse districts, you’ll sit down to banh mi, bun bo, banh xeo, Vietnamese barbecue, and more. Those words might not mean much now, but your tastebuds will absolutely remember them.

Travel between Hue and Da Nang or Hoi An in true, local style: on a motorbike on this private Hai Van Pass tour. Take the backroads—no highways—scouting for fishing villages, waterfalls, beaches, and more while avoiding the tourist crowds. Opt for a professional driver to sit back and take in the view, or go for the adrenaline rush and ride on your own. Choose from a one-way journey between Da Nang/Hoi An and Hue, or do the full loop.

Pick-up from Da Nang Airport, train station to any hotel address in Da Nang center (within 7 km of the airport ), Or vice versa ( From Da Nang hotel back airport/ train station). => If you do not see your hotel in the pickup/drop-off list, no worries. Please select any address in the city center, then write your exact hotel address in the Notes / Special Requests section. Our driver will use the address provided in your note. => The driver will wait with a name sign at the meeting point for a seamless experience. =>Feel free to contact us via WhatsApp for further details. Please ensure you update us with any changes to the flight number or arrival time ( click call Activity Provider to know driver number) => Complimentary transfers are available for hotels located within 7 kilometers of the airport. An additional surcharge will apply based on extra distance from the booked pickup/drop-off point: USD 2 for over 2 km, USD 4 for 3–5 km, and USD 6 for 6–10 km.

Experience the thrill of quad biking like never before in the picturesque setting of our rural village and jungle! Get ready for an adrenaline-fueled adventure as you navigate your way through rugged terrains, muddy trails, and lush green landscapes. Whether you are a seasoned rider or a beginner, our professional guides will ensure your safety while providing an unforgettable experience in the heart of nature's playground. So gear up, embrace the thrill, and make memories that will last a lifetime. After an exhilarating quad bike ride through the rural village and jungle, satisfy your hunger with a delicious BBQ lunch that will tantalize your taste buds, indulge in a grilled delights, sizzling hot off the grill. From juicy steaks and tender chicken to grilled vegetables and flavorful marinades, our BBQ menu has something to appease every palate. We pride ourselves on providing a complete and unforgettable experience. Book it now for the ultimate day of adventure and culinary delight!

During this trip, you can rest assured because the guide will take care of all the logistics, including picking up and dropping off guests at the hotel, having a good lunch, and learning about Hue's culture and history. In addition, if you go in a small group (12 people maximum), the tour guide will take care of you carefully. Hue City is one of the top two tourist destinations in Central Vietnam and will be the ideal choice for travelers with a tight budget and limited time. In just one day, you will discover many tourist attractions in Hue, such as the Citadel, Tomb, Pagoda, etc. Besides, you will admire the majestic beauty of Hai Van Pass, Lap An Lagoon, and Lang Co Beach without worrying about renting a car or transportation to get there. Moreover, you will get a better understanding of Hue through the knowledge that only your guide can give you.

Discover the best of Da Nang with an unforgettable journey through nature, culture, and breathtaking landscapes. Explore the mystical Marble Mountains with hidden caves and ancient pagodas before heading to Son Tra Peninsula, home to the rare Red-shanked Douc Langur. Visit the magnificent Linh Ung Pagoda and admire the 67-meter Lady Buddha statue overlooking the sea. Continue your adventure through scenic mountain roads to Chessboard Peak and the stunning Hai Van Pass, famous for its panoramic coastal views. Along the journey, enjoy a light local lunch and refreshing drinks to keep you energized. End your perfect day with a complimentary 45-minute foot massage to relax and recharge after the adventure.

With Fun Dive tour, our team of certified PADI divers will lead you to the reef and point out to our main attractions. The Cham Island Marine Park offers a fascinating macro life: nudibranch in different colors and shapes, shrimps, seahorses, ghost pipefish as well as a beautiful coral garden with fish from barracuda, lion fish, stone fish, frog fish to groupers. If you are lucky you might even spot a turtle. We like to dive slow and discover as much as possible, depending on your dive level the guide will plan the depth. Generally the best spots are between 10-25m.

When you book with us on Tripadvisor Experiences, you’re not simply reserving a ride—you’re stepping into a world of unparalleled comfort, care, and personalized service. From the moment we pick you up at your hotel to your safe return after exploring the iconic Golden Bridge and other trending destinations, our team goes above and beyond to ensure you feel like a VIP. Our drivers are more than just chauffeurs—they’re local ambassadors who share insider tips and fascinating insights about Ba Na Hills, enriching your adventure with authentic stories and recommendations. Book your Sun World Ba Na Hills ticket today and experience a magical adventure in the clouds. Begin with a breathtaking cable car ride offering panoramic views of lush mountains and waterfalls. At the summit, stroll across the iconic Golden Bridge, held aloft by giant stone hands, and take in incredible views perfect for photos. Explore the charming French Village with its European-style architecture, street performances, and romantic atmosphere. Enjoy thrilling attractions at Fantasy Park, Vietnam’s largest indoor theme park, packed with rides, games, and family fun. Wander through colorful flower gardens, visit ancient pagodas, and relax in the cool mountain air. Savor delicious local and international cuisine with a variety of dining options, including buffet restaurants. With natural beauty, cultural charm, and exciting entertainment all in one place, Sun World Ba Na Hills is a must-visit destination in Da Nang. Don’t miss out—book now and create memories that last a lifetime.

- Step into the Future of Cultural Discovery: Da Nang Museum offers a high-tech exploration of Central Vietnam’s history. Located in the city centre, it features over 2,500 artifacts enhanced by digital storytelling and multimedia technology. - Interactive & Immersive Experience: Touchscreens, digital maps, and AR features make the museum engaging for all ages. History becomes hands-on, with exhibits that respond to your curiosity. - Sleek Design & Stunning Views: The modern architecture blends indoor and outdoor beauty, offering spacious galleries and breath-taking views of the Han River—perfect for memorable photos. - A Unique Blend of Culture and Innovation: More than just a museum, it’s a smart cultural destination where learning, design, and technology meet. Ideal for modern travellers and families alike.

Come on a fascinating 3-hour tour of the Son Tra peninsula from Danang city. Wind your way along the steep roads and hairpin bends of monkey mountain as you tackle one of Vietnam’s most hair-raising drives. Travelling in a restored U.S. army jeep, your driver and guide shows you the sites all while you sit and enjoy your open air jeep tour. Explore the lush greenery and diverse wildlife, including the red-shanked douc langurs ( monkey), of Son Tra mountain. Journey along the forgotten road to visit a former us army heliport. soaking up the dramatic coastal views. Ascend to the top of banco peak for a breathtaking 360 degree view of the highest point in Danang. And learn about how chessboard mountain got its name. Soak up the dramatic coastal views, before we pay a visit to the beautiful Linh Ung pagoda, home of Danang's famous lady buddha statue before heading back to your hotel. A truly memorable and breathtaking experience.

Vietnam is famous for its incredible coffee culture and cafes, but it can be hard to find many local specialty drinks abroad. Learn how to make some of the most popular drinks at home with this small-group coffee-making workshop in Da Nang. Get hands-on experience crafting four types of Vietnamese coffee, including the classic cafe phin, egg coffee, salt coffee, and coconut coffee.

If it is canceled due to bad weather, you will be offered an alternative date or a full refund. Children can participate in a “Try Dive” from the age of 10. --- Single Dive: Enjoy 1 hour of diving + 1 hour of snorkeling Double Dive: After the first dive, the boat moves to another site for a second 1-hour dive --- Options for Certified Divers Typical dive depth: 10–25 meters ‍ Ratio: 1 instructor per 3–4 divers Options for Non-Certified Divers (Try dive) Typical dive depth: 3-6 meters ‍ Ratio: 1 instructor per 1–2 divers

Discover the beauty of Cham Island on an unforgettable day trip from Da Nang. Enjoy a convenient hotel pick-up and transfer to Cua Dai Harbor, where you'll board a speed boat for a scenic ride to the island. Once at Lang Beach, explore highlights such as the Marine Protected Area, Boat Shelter, Hai Tang Pagoda, and a traditional fishing village. Dive into crystal-clear waters for an exciting snorkeling experience. Relax at Bai Ong Ecological Zone or Bai Chong Beach, swimming and savoring a fresh seafood lunch. Return to Da Nang with cherished memories of your Cham Island adventure.

This sunrise experience is designed for travelers who want to enjoy Da Nang’s most iconic sights in the most peaceful time of the day. Unlike regular daytime tours, you’ll visit Lady Buddha at sunrise, when the sky is soft, the air is cool, and the views over the coastline are absolutely magical. The early start also means you can explore Marble Mountains before the crowds arrive, giving you a more relaxed and authentic experience. The gentle morning light creates the best conditions for photography, perfect for couples, solo travelers, and content lovers looking for stunning shots without harsh sunlight. Another special touch is that the tour finishes early, so guests can still enjoy the rest of their day for beach time, Bana Hills, or other activities. Peaceful, crowd-free, cooler weather, and perfect sunrise photos — that’s what makes this tour truly special.

Begin your evening with a convenient pickup from your hotel/ apartment in Da Nang. Head to the port and board a cruise ship. Settle in and enjoy a Western set menu (drinks not included) as you sail along the river. Take in the views of the city skyline and feel the cool night breeze. Enjoy a variety of onboard activities, including an Apsara Dance or Hawaii Dance performance and an energetic DJ set. If you're sailing on a Friday, Saturday, or Sunday, catch the Dragon Fire Show at 9:00 PM. *The Dragon Fire Show may be canceled without notice and no refunds will be applied in such cases* After your cruise, disembark and return to your hotel. * Western Set Menu (subject to change): Caesar Salad Pumpkin Soup with pan scallops Grilled salmon with passion sauce Smashed potato Seasonal fruit *Kid menu (2-10 years old, subject to change): Sausage Sweet cream corn soup w/shrimps Fried rice w/prawn Ice cream

Escape the city bustle and embrace the cool majesty of Hai Van Pass, one of Vietnam’s most scenic mountain routes. Begin your adventure at Hai Van Xanh Glamping, where complimentary welcome drinks, refreshing mountain air, and lush green surroundings make for the perfect photo-worthy check-in spot. Relax in cozy wooden huts and open-air lounges designed for comfort and nature lovers alike. Continue to the legendary Hai Van Quan, a former military gateway rich in history and charm. From this mountaintop, admire sweeping views of Da Nang’s coastline, the winding pass, Lang Co Bay’s golden sands, and the mist-covered Truong Son mountains. With expert local guidance, skip-the-crowds access, and countless photo opportunities, this half-day retreat perfectly blends history, nature, and tranquility—ideal for couples, families, and friends seeking a memorable, easy-to-reach escape into Central Vietnam’s breathtaking highlands.

Cham island includes a group of 8 small islands of Quang Nam, the largest island of Hon Lao. The waters around Cham Islands have a rich biodiversity with coral reefs, mollusks, tiger shrimp, sea weeds, … many of which are listed in the world’s Red Book of endangered species. It is recognized as a World Biosphere Reserve by UNESCO. Besides that, Cham Islands has beautiful seascapes and landscapes with blue sea, white sand and sunshine. When you travel with us, you will: Have a professional, long-term guide, giving you tips to visit the most beautiful spots of Cham island. Our car picks you up at your hotel in the center, no need to worry about extremely expensive taxi fees. Go snorkeling and swimming and get to see abundant and thriving coral reefs up close Visit a local fishing village, where you can buy souvenirs, meet the locals, and more Indulge in a delicious set lunch and get a chance to have it on the islands while enjoying your surroundings
